title: Espeletiopsis guacharaca
taxonomy: Espeletiopsis guacharaca belongs to the family Asteraceae and is a species of flowering plant. It is part of the genus Espeletiopsis, which is native to the Andean region of South America. More specifically, Espeletiopsis guacharaca is classified as a member of the tribe Senecioneae within the family Asteraceae. Additionally, it is closely related to other plants in the Asteraceae family, such as the Senecio genus. Its classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants.
